title: verbascum affine
intro: Verbascum affine, also known as the yellow mullein, is a perennial plant belonging to the figwort family. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum affine have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin infections. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. Verbascum affine is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or poultice to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health concerns.
